Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
United Center
Chicago, IL
Seating Capacity: 21711
Venue Type : Indoor Arena

Total Gigs: 4
  DMB  (4)

Longest Performance:
12.05.12 - Crush (15:30)
Venue Picture
Description
Construction for the United Center began in April of 1992, with the ribbon cutting ceremony being held on August 18, 1994 and at the time was the largest indoor arena in the Unites States. The United Center hosted the Democratic National Convention in 1996 and is home to the Chicago Bulls and Chicago Blackhawks.
